name: Naples Pro Pickleball Club
description:
Naples Pro Pickleball Club is a professional grade indoor pickleball court catering to those seeking to elevate their game. This court has previously been used by some of the top players in the country and is now open and available to the public on a reservation basis. 

You can reserve the court or sign-up for any of our weekly events all on our website. 

We look forward to seeing you on the court!
fees: Fee required — Reserve the court for a small fee, or sign-up for our weekly recurring events on our website
